related.name: XV. The Devil
related.teaser: The Devil is the shadow of matter — chains of illusion where desire binds the soul to form.

related.name: ♉ Taurus
related.teaser: Taurus is the fertile ground — patient bull, body of Earth, keeper of roots.

related.name: ♍ Virgo
related.teaser: Virgo is the wheat of Earth — patient harvester, discerning servant, keeper of order.

related.name: ᛃ Jera
related.teaser: Jera is the patient circle — the field answers in its own season.

related.name: III. The Empress
related.teaser: The Empress is the flowering womb, rose of Venus, matrix of compassion and abundance.

related.name: ᛝ Ingwaz
related.teaser: Ingwaz is the sleeping sun — the seed that remembers summer.

related.name: ᚢ Uruz
related.teaser: Uruz is the body’s bull — primal strength yoked to purpose.

related.name: ♀ Venus
related.teaser: Venus is the rose of harmony — magnetic union, pulse of beauty, lover’s path.

related.name: XXI. The World
related.teaser: The World is the mandorla of unity — the circle complete, the dance of matter and spirit fulfilled.
